allow:
Bash(powershell.exe -Command "
Copy-Item 'C:\\Users\\ayoni\\OneDrive\\Desktop\\Options-Pricing-Lib\\Options_Pricing_Library_Plan.docx' 'C:\\Users\\ayoni\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\plan.docx'
py -3.12 -c @'
from docx import Document
doc = Document\(r'C:\\Users\\ayoni\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\plan.docx'\)
for para in doc.paragraphs:
    print\(para.text\)
for table in doc.tables:
    for row in table.rows:
        cells = ' | '.join\(cell.text for cell in row.cells\)
        print\(cells\)
'@
" 2>&1)

'@
